channel.title: Tsuzuki — Anime Premieres & Finales
channel.description: Upcoming and recent anime premieres and season finales, updated daily.

item.title: STEEL BALL RUN JoJo's Bizarre Adventure 2nd - 3rd STAGE — Finale (Ep 11)
item.description: Finale: The second race stage of JoJo no Kimyou na Bouken: Steel Ball Run . In the 2nd STAGE, a desert crossing spanning roughly 750 miles- the land that Johnny Joestar and Gyro Zeppeli must challenge, is home to the area that is feared as the "Devil's Palm." In 1875, a threat lurking…

item.title: Witch on the Holy Night — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: Near the end of the Showa era in the late 1980s, in Misaki town, an old mansion is rumored to be the home of a witch. After moving into the mansion, Aoko Aozaki begins to learn sorcery from a young mage, Alice Kuonji, the rumored witch of the mansion. The Aozaki family oversees…

item.title: GROTESQQQUE — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: Anthology movie consisting of three original animation segments: Q1 - ÆLIENS (エリィアンズ): Earth has entered an era of intergalatic exchange. Amidst swirling prejudice and fear of aliens, Elie, an alien girl, arrives as a space goodwill ambassador. She loves Earth's culture and its…

item.title: Made in Abyss: Mezameru Shinpi — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: Sequel to Made in Abyss: Retsujitsu no Ougonkyou.

item.title: BLEACH: Thousand-Year Blood War - The Calamity — Finale (Ep 13)
item.description: Finale: The fourth and final part of BLEACH: Sennen Kessen-hen . Destruction looms at the end of the Thousand-Year Blood War between the Soul Reapers and Quincies… as the death of the Soul King mirrors the collapse of the Three Worlds, distortions and omens of destruction start to…

item.title: Rascal Does Not Dream of a Dear Friend — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: Theatrical follow-up to Seishun Buta Yarou wa Santa Claus no Yume wo Minai . "Actually, I’m Touko Kirishima." The audience erupted in excitement upon learning that the true identity of the mysterious, wildly popular internet singer was none other than the nation’s favorite…

item.title: Toaru Anbu no ITEM — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: This is a story of four girls living in the "Dark Side" of Academy City. In Academy City where "ESP" has been recognized as a general science. Behind the peace, there is a Dark Side organization that undertakes missions that cannot be made public. "ITEM" is an elite unit…

item.title: To You in the Beyond — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: The story centers on a boy named Kazuki Tsukigase, who transfers to a high school on a remote island to get away from anyone who knows him. Kazuki finds out that there is an inlet on the island where people are rumored to disappear. Exploring the inlet, he encounters an…

item.title: Girls und Panzer: Saishuushou 5 — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: The fifth film in the six-part Girls und Panzer: Saishuushou film series.

item.title: Magic Knight Rayearth (2026) — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: In celebration of "Magic Knight Rayearth” animes' 30th anniversary, a new animation project has been launched! Note: Title and relations are provisional and subject to change.

item.title: Blue Box Season 2 — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: The second season of Ao no Hako .

item.title: The Ramparts of Ice Season 2 — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: The second season of Koori no Jouheki .

item.title: Re:ZERO -Starting Life in Another World- Season 4 — Finale (Ep 19)
item.description: Finale: The fourth season of Re:Zero kara Hajimeru Isekai Seikatsu . To save his stricken allies, Subaru faces a deadly desert to find the Sage at Pleiades Watchtower. (Source: Crunchyroll News) Note: Lucca Comics & Games pre-screened episode 1 early on November 1, 2025, prior to the…

item.title: Clevatess Season 2 — Finale (Ep 13)
item.description: Finale: The second season of Clevatess: Majuu no Ou to Akago to Kabane no Yuusha .

item.title: I Want to Love You Till Your Dying Day — Finale (Ep 13)
item.description: Finale: At the mysterious orphanage where Sheena lives, death is nothing new to its residents—girls who no longer have families of their own, who are raised as weapons of war, taught to kill and take the lives of others without batting an eye. Everyone, that is, except Sheena, who…

item.title: STEEL BALL RUN JoJo's Bizarre Adventure 2nd - 3rd STAGE — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: The second race stage of JoJo no Kimyou na Bouken: Steel Ball Run . In the 2nd STAGE, a desert crossing spanning roughly 750 miles- the land that Johnny Joestar and Gyro Zeppeli must challenge, is home to the area that is feared as the "Devil's Palm." In 1875, a threat lurking…

item.title: Wareware wa Uchuujin — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: One summer in the third grade, a quiet boy named Tsubasa meets Kyotaro, a boy everyone in the class looked up to, and the two become close friends. Within their small world, they share irreplaceable moments—until a small incident suddenly tears them apart. Spanning more than…

item.title: Smoking Behind the Supermarket with You — Finale (Ep 12)
item.description: Finale: At age forty-five, office worker Sasaki has had enough of the corporate grind. His only solace is smoking-and the friendly smile of supermarket cashier Yamada. When Sasaki can't find Yamada after a particularly trying day, a striking woman invites him to smoke with her. The…

item.title: Dara-san of the Reiwa Era — Finale (Ep 13)
item.description: Finale: Clouds blacken the sky and sheets of rain turn the mountain forest into a treacherous maze... A landslide crushes a razor wire fence, and buries a "NO TRESPASSING" sign... Two young siblings wander into a dark world where they do not belong, and a long, horrid shadow rears up…

item.title: Candy Caries — Finale (Ep 24)
item.description: Finale: Ame is a child who loves sweets, and the tooth decay that lives in her mouth called Caries. Caries lives a carefree life inside Ame's mouth and even calls her "Mama", and Ame's body is always at Caries' mercy. (Source: Anime News Network, edited)

item.title: Trapped in a Dating Sim: The World of Otome Games is Tough for Mobs Season 2 — Finale (Ep 12)
item.description: Finale: The second season of Otomege Sekai wa Mob ni Kibishii Sekai desu .

item.title: Saga of Tanya the Evil Season 2 — Finale (Ep 12)
item.description: Finale: The second season of Youjo Senki .

item.title: Yoroi-Shinden Samurai Troopers Cour 2 — Finale (Ep 12)
item.description: Finale: The second part of Yoroi Shinden Samurai Troopers .

item.title: Grand Blue Dreaming Season 3 — Finale (Ep 12)
item.description: Finale: The third season of Grand Blue .

item.title: Oh Boy, Was I Wrong About Her — Finale (Ep 12)
item.description: Finale: Seven years after making a childhood promise to always be friends, Hayato is reunited with his formerly tomboyish pal Haruki at a city high school–only now, Haruki has transformed into the girl every guy dreams about! While Haruki’s looks may have changed, with Hayato, she’s…

item.title: The Forsaken Saintess and Her Foodie Roadtrip in Another World — Finale (Ep 12)
item.description: Finale: Rin Takanashi, a caregiver in her thirties, was unceremoniously discarded as "trash" despite being summoned as a saint. However, as a lover of the great outdoors and all things camping, she was blessed with a special skill, "Survival," as well as another unique skill! Thus, a…

item.title: Flaming Dodgeball Girl Danko — Finale (Ep 12)
item.description: Finale: The sequel to the legendary dodgeball manga Honou no Toukyuuji Dodge Danpei ! In this modern version of the hot-blooded dodgeball story, Danpei's daughter, Danko, follows in his footsteps, struggling to build a dodgeball team with the strongest fighting spirit in the modern age…

item.title: A Livid Lady’s Guide to Getting Even: How I Crushed My Homeland with My Mighty Grimoires — Finale (Ep 12)
item.description: Finale: Elizabeth Leiston, daughter of the influential prime minister, is a picture-perfect lady on the path to becoming the future queen of the Kingdom of Haldoria. But her life takes a sudden turn for the worst when her fiancé makes a show of publicly calling off their engagement.…

item.title: Skeleton Knight in Another World Season 2 — Finale (Ep 12)
item.description: Finale: The second season of Gaikotsu Kishi-sama, Tadaima Isekai e Odekakechuu .

item.title: The Insipid Prince's Furtive Grab for the Throne — Finale (Ep 12)
item.description: Finale: To the empire, Prince Arnold is one big joke, a completely inept prince outshone by his more talented twin, Leonard. But in secret, Arnold operates as Silver, one of only five magic-wielding SS-rank adventurers on the continent. As the bloody battle for the throne intensifies…

item.title: Anime AzurLane: Slow Ahead! Season 2 — Finale (Ep 12)
item.description: Finale: The second season of Azur Lane: Bisoku Zenshin!

item.title: Goodbye, Lara — Finale (Ep 12)
item.description: Finale: Once upon a time, a mermaid princess named Lara fell in love with a human prince. To be with him, she used a witch’s potion to become human—but the magic came at a cost: If she failed to find true love, she would vanish into sea foam forever. Now, 200 years later, Lara awakens…

item.title: The World's Strongest Rearguard — Finale (Ep 12)
item.description: Finale: After a fatal accident, overworked office worker Arihito Atobe is reborn in the Labyrinth Country as a Seeker with the rare Rearguard class—an all-purpose support role that excels in attack, defense, and healing. Joined by a fierce demi-human mercenary and his former boss,…

item.title: Let's go KAIKIGUMI — Finale (Ep 12)
item.description: Finale: The horror comedy manga begins one fateful day when the cowardly (unnamed) protagonist meets Mechako, the leader of the "Kaikigumi" organization which is in charge of the ghosts and supernatural creatures scaring humans. The protagonist somehow takes part in the revival of the…

item.title: Rich Girl Caretaker: I'm Secretly the Caregiver of the Most Popular Girl in This Rich Kid School — Finale (Ep 12)
item.description: Finale: Hinako Konohana is the perfect young lady—graceful, elegant, and flawless… or so everyone thinks. Behind closed doors, she’s a total disaster who can’t handle basic chores! When ordinary student Itsuki Tomonari becomes her caretaker, he’s thrown into 24/7 damage control,…

item.title: The Duke’s Son Claims He Won’t Love Me Yet Showers Me with Adoration — Finale (Ep 12)
item.description: Finale: Elsa, the daughter of a fallen aristocrat, receives news. It was a marriage proposal from Julius, a very elite nobleman. Elsa is wondering," Why would such a distinguished man marry me"? But after the wedding, Julius, who had been kind and gentle up to that point, changed…

item.title: Magical Girl Lyrical Nanoha EXCEEDS Gun Blaze Vengeance — Finale (Ep 12)
item.description: Finale: Thirty years ago, the world was nearly destroyed by the sudden appearance of unknown "invasive alien species." Humans and these “invasive species” continue to vie for living space, and while humanity’s safety is currently barely secured, the world could be destroyed at any…

item.title: The Ogre's Bride — Finale (Ep 12)
item.description: Finale: A Japanese-style ayakashi Cinderella story! "You're the bride I've been searching for all this time." The ayakashi and humans coexist in harmony. The ayakashi, having superior abilities and beautiful appearances, sometimes find their partner among human women, making them their…

item.title: Daemons of the Shadow Realm — Finale (Ep 24)
item.description: Finale: In a remote mountain village under the watchful eyes of two stone guardians, the young Yuru contentedly lives off the land while staying close to the only family he has left—Asa, his precious twin sister. Asa, meanwhile, carries out a mysterious “duty” on behalf of the village…

item.title: Snack Hazama — Finale (Ep 12)
item.description: Finale: A weekly mini anime shown with each episode of Ushiro no Shoumen Kamui-san .

item.title: KAMUI ---He's behind you — Finale (Ep 12)
item.description: Finale: This exorcism is OMFFFFFFFFF!!!! Shizuka is a self-proclaimed ordinary high school girl who "only" sees ghosts. Using her unique ability to attract spirits, she works as an assistant to the famous psychic, Kamui. Though Kamui boasts overwhelming spiritual power, his exorcism…

item.title: Draw This, Then Die! — Finale (Ep 12)
item.description: Finale: First-year high school student Ai Yasumi lives on the island of Izu Oshima and loves reading manga. But after a certain turning point, she sets her sights on creating stories of her own! As she dives into the world of manga-making, Ai faces challenges, growth, and the…

item.title: The Drops of God — Finale (Ep 24)
item.description: Finale: World-renowned wine critic Yutaka Kanzaki has passed away, leaving behind a wine collection worth over 12 billion yen. His will states that his collection will be given to the one who can identify the origin and year of twelve wines he’s chosen, the “Twelve Apostles”, and one…

item.title: I Became a Legend After My 10 Year-Long Last Stand — Finale (Ep 12)
item.description: Finale: Luck, an S-rank mage in the hero’s party, makes a last stand against the Demon King to save his companions. When he finally returns victorious, ten years have passed, and the world praises him as a legendary hero who died in battle. Unable to reclaim his former life, Luck…

item.title: Meitantei Precure! Fushigi na Niwa to Futari no Himitsu — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: Movie of Meitantei Precure! .

item.title: Bungo Stray Dogs WAN! 2 — Finale (Ep 12)
item.description: Finale: The second season of Bungou Stray Dogs Wan!

item.title: Hana-Kimi Season 2 — Finale (Ep 13)
item.description: Finale: The second season of Hanazakari no Kimitachi e . Note: Hanazakari no Kimitachi e 2nd Season is streaming 1 week in advance of the TV broadcast on Prime Video and Crunchyroll beginning with episode 2 on July 2nd.

item.title: Welcome to Demon School! Iruma-kun Season 4 — Finale (Ep 24)
item.description: Finale: The fourth season of Mairimashita! Iruma-kun. Suzuki Iruma and all thirteen students of the Misfit Class must perform to reach Rank 4 at the Music Festival. (Source: Crunchyroll News)

item.title: Saishuu Gakushou Hibike! Euphonium - Kouhen — Premiere (Ep 1)
item.description: Premiere: Sequel to Saishuu Gakushou Hibike! Euphonium - Zenpen . Note: Relations are provisional and subject to change.

item.title: BanG Dream! YUME∞MITA — Finale (Ep 13)
item.description: Finale: Suddenly thrown together, a group of girls are now debuting as the virtual band, Mugendai Mewtype. They’ve got talent and personality, but no clue how to perform as one. Can they survive, let alone make it to the top in this unforgiving music world? (Source: Crunchyroll)
